page_metadata.biotools__summary: Graphical, event-driven tool dedicated to the identification of driver fusion rearrangements in human cancer through the analysis of paired-end high-throughput transcriptome sequencing data. Requires short, paired-end sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Graphical, event-driven tool dedicated to the identification of driver fusion rearrangements in human cancer through the analysis of paired-end high-throughput transcriptome sequencing data. Requires short, paired-end sequences.
